notes: txid_current aliases the engine-owned local transaction id path
txid_current returns SQL null when no transaction context exists
no-arg txid_status reports the current engine-owned local transaction id as in_progress
no-arg txid_status returns SQL null when no current transaction exists
txid_status(bigint) returns in_progress for the current local transaction id
txid_status(bigint) returns unknown for non-current ids without claiming finality
txid_status(bigint) propagates SQL null input
mga_snapshot_id returns the engine-owned snapshot visible-through local transaction id
mga_snapshot_id returns SQL null without transaction context
pg_xact_status follows txid_status semantics for the current local transaction
pg_xact_status returns SQL null when no current transaction exists
pg_xact_status(transaction_id) returns in_progress for the current local transaction id
pg_xact_status(transaction_id) returns unknown for non-current ids without claiming finality
pg_xact_status(transaction_id) propagates SQL null input
savepoint_active returns false when the MGA savepoint marker store has no active savepoint
savepoint_active returns true after transaction.create_savepoint records an active MGA marker
savepoint_active(name) returns true for a named active MGA savepoint marker
savepoint_active(name) returns false for an absent savepoint marker
savepoint_active(name) returns false after transaction.release_savepoint releases the MGA marker
savepoint_active(name) propagates SQL null name input
